certification_name: Salesforce Certified Marketing Cloud Engagement Administrator

testing_centers.notes: In-person and online proctored via Kryterion Webassessor

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name must match Webassessor registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials. No access to Salesforce org. Proctor monitors via webcam.
renewal_options: Salesforce releases three major updates per year. For each release, certified professionals must complete a free maintenance module on Trailhead to retain their certification. No cost for maintenance.
target_audience: Administrators who can configure Marketing Cloud products utilizing industry and product best practices
recommended_experience: 3 to 6 months of experience administering a Marketing Cloud instance and prior experience with digital marketing

retake_policy.notes: Retake available after scheduling (no mandatory waiting period for first retake). Retake fee ~$100 for most exams.

objectives.title: Describe governance and compliance in relation to digital marketing
Recognize security best practices for data, permissions, and PII
Describe Marketing Cloud product inventory and product offerings
Given a scenario, describe the contact model
Given a scenario, evaluate data quality
Explain preference and profile center concepts
Given a scenario, implement the configuration of business units, users/permissions, and security/passwords
Given a scenario, determine how to configure integrations
Describe the features in Setup Home
Given a scenario, describe the configuration of Mobile Studio
Given a scenario, describe the configuration of Email Studio
Given a scenario, describe the configuration of Advertising Studio
Explain the concepts and typical use cases of Journey Builder
Given a scenario, describe solutions for data extraction and report generation
Given a scenario, monitor a Marketing Cloud account and provide system availability
Given a scenario, evaluate benefits of additional Marketing Cloud products

official_study_resources.title: Salesforce Trailhead
official_study_resources.notes: Free official learning platform with trails aligned to each certification

official_study_resources.title: Salesforce Exam Guide & Sample Questions
official_study_resources.notes: Free exam guides with sample questions on each credential page

aliases: salesforce certified marketing cloud engagement administrator
